title: Trouble being honest about myself — May 2022 self-audit
html:
TL;DR

  • A blunt, brief self-audit. Top imperative: "Be honest about yourself" — paired with "Break the habit of accepting everything that is given to you."
  • A cosmic-scale question Yahir asks himself: "What makes the colors more vibrant, the food taste better, the sounds sharper…?" — read as the earliest articulation of his pursuit of the heightened perception trigger state that recurs through 2024–26.
  • Idiosyncratic "facts about self" jotted afterwards: don't fuck with black socks, Hershey squirts since starting protein, commit to listening to one country artist consistently, beast at ping pong, doesn't really fuck with Cush.
  • Closes with four song titles: Danger Incorporated, Change Me, Murder, First to Last.

Key quote

"What makes the colors more vibrant, the food taste better, the sounds sharper…?"

Why it matters in the graph

  • The vibrancy question is the conceptual seed that flowers in 2024 09 12 never forget you can do whatever the fuck you want ("the internal flame"), 2024 12 14 departing china ("beauty in the unknown"), and 2025 10 14 feral strength manic focus ("feral strength and manic focus").
  • "Cush" (cousin / friend / drug?) referenced just once here — flag for entity-disambiguation if it recurs.
  • Listening to "one country artist consistently" pairs with 2025 07 18 slideshow death song's music-as-identity-marker arc.

Open questions

  • Who/what is "Cush"?
  • Is "first to last" a song or a personal mantra?
  • Does the food-taste / sound-sharpness question ever resolve into a practice Yahir adopts?

Wikilinks
